title: Probleyes' Produce
description: A resource pack intending to redux or tweak most of the food items in the game!
body:
Probleyes' Produce adjusts the visuals of the main produce items found in the game. Also changing some modded items, doing so with a focus on small tweaks to improve the general appeal and cohesiveness of the sprites alongside the changes to vanilla ones!

Currently has compat with Farmer's Delight, Brewin' and Chewin' and No Man's land! 

More compatibility will be added in the future, likely focusing on a few of the more popular FD addons and any other mods with bowl or bottle foods that catch my eye.
